query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same core mechanism (multimodal tabular learning with text) and establishes an empirical baseline for the specific domain of tabular datasets containing textual features, which is a primary component of the user's question. Although the user's question also includes "image" modality, the paper's focus on the text-tabular intersection makes it a canonical prior work for the literature review of this specific benchmarking proble
